tasks.subject: Task 1: Add _cleanup_stale_state_for_relaunch helper + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New async helper on CrawlerManager. Deletes _completion_marker.json if present. Dead code at end of task.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py

**Verify:** Docker pytest → 3 PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "docker compose run --rm crawler-service pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestCleanupStaleStateForRelaunch -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["async helper with docstring", "deletes marker via os.unlink if isfile", "INFO log on success", "WARNING log on OSError no raise", "no callers wired", "3 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Manual verification (docker compose smoke + Ecritel production)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end smoke + production + 24h observation + sub-problem A regression.

**Files:** None modified.

**Verify:** logs + DB evidence per spec §6.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "docker compose logs crawler-service --since 24h | grep 'Reconciling from marker; webhook skipped' | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pytest passes", "smoke: marker removed + no false reconciliation", "production deployed", "false reconciliation volume drops near-zero", "fresh crawl_id no-op preserved", "sub-problem A intended scenario still works"]}
```
